entities.createSql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL, `isSystemApp` INTEGER NOT NULL, `packageName` TEXT NOT NULL, `lastUsedTime` INTEGER NOT NULL, `usageCount` INTEGER NOT NULL, `sortOrder` INTEGER NOT NULL, `appFlag` INTEGER NOT NULL)

indices.name: index_app_info_packageName
indices.createSql: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_app_info_packageName` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`packageName`)

indices.name: index_app_info_lastUsedTime
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_app_info_lastUsedTime` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`lastUsedTime`)

indices.name: index_app_info_isSystemApp
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_app_info_isSystemApp` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`isSystemApp`)

indices.name: index_app_info_usageCount
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_app_info_usageCount` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`usageCount`)

indices.name: index_app_info_sortOrder
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_app_info_sortOrder` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`sortOrder`)

indices.name: index_app_info_appFlag
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_app_info_appFlag` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`appFlag`)
